title: Marketplace Expansion with 30+ New Plugins, Automations, and JetBrains IDE Support
description: Cursor v2.6 adds more than 30 new plugins from partners including Atlassian, Datadog, GitLab, Glean, Hugging Face, monday.com, and PlanetScale. Introduced Automations for building persistent agents that run on schedules or triggers from Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, and webhooks. Also launched Agent Client Protocol (ACP) support for JetBrains IDEs including IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, and WebStorm. Added MCP Apps with interactive UIs, team marketplaces for plugins, and Bugbot Autofix that automatically fixes PR issues with over 35% of autofix changes being merged.

community_feedback.quote: Cursor is turning Intellij into a glorified task runner

title: Version 2.1.72 with Enhanced Tool Search and Performance Improvements
description: Claude Code 2.1.72 introduces several improvements including fixed tool search activation with ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, new 'w' key in /copy for direct file writing bypassing clipboard, optional description argument for /plan command, ExitWorktree tool, CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_CRON environment variable, and simplified effort levels (low/medium/high) with new symbols. Performance improvements include better bash command parsing, faster startup, and reduced bundle size by ~510KB.

community_feedback.quote: Introducing Code Review, a new feature for Claude Code. System prompts increased by +1,643 tokens in 2.1.72
Implement Tool Search and lazy load those MCP's - 85% token reduction

title: Progressive Web App (PWA) Support
description: Devin can now be installed as a Progressive Web App on both desktop and mobile devices. Users can install Devin by opening app.devin.ai in Chrome or Edge browsers, providing a native app-like experience without requiring a separate download.

title: GPT-5.4 Integration and Cascade Improvements
description: Windsurf adds GPT-5.4 support with limited-time promotional pricing (1x credits for no/low reasoning, 2x for medium, 3x for high, 8x for extra high). Cascade improvements include better Jupyter Notebook performance, fixed diff zones, improved UI rendering, and support for loading SKILL.md files. Also fixed Windows update initialization and released Linux ARM64 binaries.

community_feedback.quote: GPT-5.4 just dropped in Windsurf and it's kind of a big deal!
GPT-5.4 is now live in Windsurf with multiple reasoning efforts
GPT-5.4 is live in Windsurf with multiple reasoning efforts! GPT-5.4 Low is also available in Arena Mode's Frontier and Hybrid Battle Groups

title: Version 0.111.0 with GPT-5.4 Support
description: OpenAI released Codex CLI version 0.111.0 on March 5, 2026, adding support for GPT-5.4, described as their 'most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work.' Users need to update CLI, IDE extension, or Codex app to access GPT-5.4. The model features 1M context window, 128K output capacity, and improved benchmark performance (75% on SWE-Bench vs 64% for GPT-5.3-Codex).

community_feedback.quote: I've been using Codex based on GPT-5.4, and I'm honestly impressed. It feels like a very strong coding tool, especially for real project work
GPT 5.4 is the first time I've used codex for multiple hours
Codex CLI is preferred for 'long unsupervised sessions' compared to Claude Code
